music: short punchy cinematic build, driving percussion, resolves on a warm chord, instrumental

beats.narration: For five thousand years, money kept changing shape.

shots.scene: a museum display of the evolution of money in a row: cowrie shells, a gold coin, a paper banknote, a credit card, a glowing bitcoin, labels beneath
shots.element_motion: each money object lifts and settles in turn down the row, halftone dots pulse, a couple of coins glint

beats.narration: Shells, gold, paper, plastic, then pure code.

shots.scene: the five forms of money as bold cut-outs in a left-to-right procession: shell, gold coin, banknote, credit card, glowing bitcoin
shots.element_motion: the whole row slides left-to-right, each form swaps into the next, the bitcoin at the end spins and glows

beats.narration: But money was never the thing. It is the trust.

shots.scene: a close cut-in of an open cupped hand holding a single coin, warm light, radiating paper rays
shots.element_motion: the coin settles, a soft glow pulses once, everything else still — minimal, the point lands
